response_parsed.topic: How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.
response_parsed.opinion: Fake content on social media can be detrimental to our mental health, relationships, and overall well-being. Here are some strategies to help you manage and deal with it: 1) Be cautious of sensational or unverifiable claims, 2) Verify the credibility of sources before sharing, 3) Use fact-checking websites and tools, 4) Avoid engaging with fake content, and 5) Seek support from trusted individuals and organizations. By implementing these strategies, you can protect yourself and your online community from the harmful effects of fake content on social media.
